name: Tribeca Global Natural Resources Limited
analysis: Price has pulled back and is testing the 55 EMA at A$2.6822. This is a core Fibonacci pullback to a key trend EMA. Strong confluence zone at A$2.6785 where 6 levels cluster. Trade setup: entry A$2.6822, stop A$2.4453, target A$2.7326. Risk/reward is 0.21:1. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
